panels.title: p95 latency (ms) — latest run per scenario

targets.rawSql: SELECT scenario, MAX(CASE WHEN orm='prisma' THEN p95_ms END) AS prisma, MAX(CASE WHEN orm='typeorm' THEN p95_ms END) AS typeorm FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (orm, scenario) orm, scenario, p95_ms FROM bench_runs ORDER BY orm, scenario, ran_at DESC) t GROUP BY scenario ORDER BY scenario;

SELECT scenario, MAX(CASE WHEN orm='prisma' THEN p99_ms END) AS prisma, MAX(CASE WHEN orm='typeorm' THEN p99_ms END) AS typeorm FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (orm, scenario) orm, scenario, p99_ms FROM bench_runs ORDER BY orm, scenario, ran_at DESC) t GROUP BY scenario ORDER BY scenario;

SELECT scenario, MAX(CASE WHEN orm='prisma' THEN rps END) AS prisma, MAX(CASE WHEN orm='typeorm' THEN rps END) AS typeorm FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (orm, scenario) orm, scenario, rps FROM bench_runs ORDER BY orm, scenario, ran_at DESC) t GROUP BY scenario ORDER BY scenario;
SELECT ran_at AS time, scenario || ' / ' || orm AS metric, p95_ms AS value FROM bench_runs ORDER BY ran_at;

SELECT ran_at, orm, scenario, ROUND(avg_ms::numeric, 1) AS avg_ms, ROUND(p50_ms::numeric, 1) AS p50_ms, ROUND(p95_ms::numeric, 1) AS p95_ms, ROUND(p99_ms::numeric, 1) AS p99_ms, ROUND(rps::numeric, 1) AS rps, ROUND(fail_pct::numeric, 2) AS fail_pct FROM bench_runs ORDER BY ran_at DESC, scenario, orm;
